summary: Iteration 10 - Branch Permission Matrix v2 - All 24 tests PASSED. Comprehensive testing of updated RBAC: GET branches (all roles), POST/PUT branches (CEO/HR/Managers/Sr HR/Jr HR), DELETE branches (CEO/HR/Sr HR/Jr HR only - Managers now restricted), and dashboard franchises field for executor roles.

seed_data_creation: Test branches created with TEST_ prefix pattern for authorization tests, cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Branch permission matrix v2 fully implemented and tested. (1) EDIT_ROLES (POST/PUT): CEO, HR, 4 Managers, Sr HR, Jr HR. (2) DELETE_ROLES: CEO, HR, Sr HR, Jr HR ONLY - Managers are now restricted from deleting branches. (3) View-only roles (Designer, Mktg Coord, FDE) can GET branches but cannot create/edit/delete. (4) Dashboard franchises field added to sr_jr_hr, fde, designer, mktg_coord dashboard types. All 24 permission tests passed.
